description: Tony Blasencia discusses the use of NFTs and compression to enhance blockchain data richness, addressing issues like data silos and interoperability. He emphasizes the need for on-chain activity and user-centric data management.
topic_summary: In this talk, Tony Blasencia explores how NFTs and data compression can create a more data-rich blockchain, highlighting the importance of interoperability and user activity on-chain. He shares insights from his experience in consumer marketplaces and presents findings from a BCG study on user preferences for data capture and personalized experiences [t=1:20].
